body:
Fixes #190

## Summary
- Adds Rust and browser-worker handling for `Переведи "как у тебя дела?" на английский.` so the demo returns `How are you?` instead of the unknown prompt fallback.
- Makes `Что ещё ты умеешь?` / `Что еще ты умеешь?` a history-aware capabilities follow-up that lists additional abilities without repeating prior web-search or DuckDuckGo details.
- Makes the left `MENU` action group collapsible and persistent like the other sidebar sections while preserving the existing equal-height accordion behavior.
- Improves report issue links: uses `## Reproduction of dialog`, removes reproduction boilerplate, preserves the final two messages, and backfills or truncates earlier context within the URL budget.
- Adds issue #190 case-study artifacts, raw investigation data, online research notes, and before/after screenshots under `docs/case-studies/issue-190/`.

## Reproduction
1. Open the demo in manual mode.
2. Send `Ты можешь искать в интернете?`, then `Что ещё ты умеешь?`.
3. Send `Переведи "как у тебя дела?" на английский.`.
4. Collapse the left `MENU` section and create a report issue link from a long dialog.

## Visual verification
Before:
![Expanded menu from issue report](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-190-8c706a31ad6a/docs/case-studies/issue-190/screenshots/menu-wide.png?raw=true)

After:
![Collapsed menu after fix](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-190-8c706a31ad6a/docs/case-studies/issue-190/screenshots/menu-collapsed-after.png?raw=true)

## Tests
- `cargo test russian_translate_how_are_you_prompt_returns_english_surface`
- `cargo test russian_more_capabilities_follow_up_uses_history_without_repeating_web_search`
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs` (passes with warning-only near-limit files)
- `cargo test`
- `node --check src/web/formal_ai_worker.js`
- `node --check src/web/app.js`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:i18n`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:intent-coverage`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e test:local -- tests/demo.spec.js tests/issue-153.spec.js --grep "reported prompt examples resolve through the browser worker|prefilled issue URL stays below GitHub 8KB cap|known assistant dialogs include|unknown prompts include|left menu actions section can be collapsed"`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e test:local -- tests/multilingual.spec.js --grep "expanded sidebar sections share the available height equally|each section body scrolls independently when content overflows"`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e test:local` (146 passed)
- Playwright MCP sanity check: opened the demo and collapsed `MENU` to the header-only state.
- CI: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/actions/runs/26179738715

title: Fix issue reporting, menu collapse, and Russian prompts
